verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I repent for moments I have spent Recalling all the pain, And failures of my past I repent for dwelling on the things Beyond my power to change, The chains that held me fast

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will go on, My past I leave behind me I gladly take His mercy and His love He is joy and He is peace He is strength and sweet release I know He is and I am His I will go on

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I give up the bitterness and hate The blaming me and fate, For all my discontent The guilt and pain, I empty from my cup, So God can fill it up, With peace and sweet content

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will go on, My past I leave behind me I gladly take His mercy and His love He is joy and He is peace He is strength and sweet release I know He is and I am His I will go on
